title: Pseudo orphaned prose listing and cleanup tools
purpose: Provides functionality to list orphaned prose files and clean them up from both the file system and database.
module_context: Exports two main functions for handling orphaned prose: listing and cleaning up. Uses a pseudo-database interface for data access.

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the given project.
Query the database for all orphaned prose entries.
Parse the suggestions field from each database row.
Categorize each entry as either cross-branch or actual orphan.
Return the categorized orphan entries in a structured result.

methods.name: pseudo_cleanup_orphaned_prose
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, files: string[], confirm: boolean): Promise<CleanupResult>

steps.content: Validate that the confirm flag is set to true.
Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the given project.
Prepare a statement for deleting entries from the orphan_prose table.
For each file in the input list, attempt to delete it from the file system.
Delete the corresponding database entry for each successfully removed file.
Track the number of successfully deleted files and any errors encountered.
Return the cleanup results including deleted count and errors.
